macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: FOMC Keeps Rates Unchanged with Hawkish Evolution and Powell to Stay as Governor
items.summary: The Federal Reserve decided to maintain interest rates at the FOMC meeting, with minor statement tweaks noting Middle East uncertainty, elevated inflation, and solid growth. Chair Powell announced he will remain as a Governor after his term ends May 15 amid legal concerns, while dissenters pushed for removing easing bias, signaling hawkish shifts; Senate advances Kevin Warsh's nomination as next Chair.

items.title: Key US Economic Data Releases Scheduled for Today Including ADP Employment, Housing Starts, and PCE Prices
items.summary: Upcoming economic indicators include US ADP Employment Change at 12:55 PM (exp. 54.75K), Housing Starts MoM at 12:30 PM (exp. -0.7%), PCE Prices QoQ Adv at 12:30 PM (exp. 2.9%), and Fed Balance Sheet at 8:30 PM ($6.707T prior). Other data like Jobless Claims 4-week Average (exp. 210.75K) and Durable Goods Orders also due.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Dogecoin Leads Meme Sector Gains with 7.40% Rise
items.summary: The Meme sector surged 3.89% in the past 24 hours, led by Dogecoin's 7.40% increase according to SoSoValue data. Dogecoin also tops broader market gainers amid positive momentum.

items.title: Fed Decision Triggers $500 Million in Crypto Liquidations
items.summary: The Federal Reserve's decision led to $500 million in cryptocurrency liquidations over the last 24 hours. Terra Classic and Dogecoin are leading gains in the aftermath.

items.title: US Seizes Nearly $500M in Iranian Crypto in Operation Economic Fury
items.summary: The US government seized approximately $500 million in cryptocurrency linked to Iran as part of Operation Economic Fury, plunging the regime into crisis. Treasury Secretary nominee Bessent highlighted the action.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds Steady Near $76K After Fed Rebound
items.summary: Bitcoin remains firm near $76K, rebounding from a dip with strong buying interest, marking its strongest level since February amid Middle East hopes. It shows a slight -1.08% change in recent updates.

items.title: CLARITY Act Buzz Fuels Bitcoin Price Speculation to $250K
items.summary: Discussions around the anticipated CLARITY Act are generating optimism, with analysts suggesting it could propel Bitcoin toward $250K. The regulatory clarity is seen as a major catalyst for crypto.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Delayed to May 2026
items.summary: Rockstar Games has delayed Grand Theft Auto 6 to May 26, 2026, delivering the anticipated bad news to fans.[1]

items.title: The Blood of Dawnwalker Launches
items.summary: The Blood of Dawnwalker has launched, highlighted in the daily gaming news digest for April 29, 2026.[7]

items.title: Xbox Earnings Decline Across Hardware, Game Pass, and Content
items.summary: Microsoft reports Xbox revenue down sharply, including hardware sales and Game Pass, despite overall company growth in cloud and AI.[6]

items.title: Nintendo Sues Alleged Switch 2 Leaker Genki
items.summary: Nintendo takes legal action against accessory maker Genki for allegedly misleading consumers regarding Switch 2 information.[1]

items.title: New Wheel of Time AAA RPG Announced
items.summary: A full-fledged AAA video game adaptation of The Wheel of Time is announced by a studio behind the live-action series.[1]

items.title: Sony Responds to PlayStation DRM Policy Backlash
items.summary: Sony officially addresses the massive backlash sparked by PlayStation's new DRM policy.[1]

items.title: Far Far West Co-op FPS Launches April 28, 2026
items.summary: Chaotic Wild West co-op FPS Far Far West launches on April 28, 2026.[5]

items.title: New Details on Forza Horizon 6 Revealed
items.summary: Playground Games confirms new features for Forza Horizon 6, enhancing the racing experience.[5]

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Alphabet Reports Q1 Revenue Up 22% to $109.9B, Google Cloud Up 63% to $20B
items.summary: Alphabet announced strong Q1 2026 financial results with revenue beating estimates, driven by Google Cloud growth, sending GOOG shares up over 6% after hours. Paid subscriptions reached 350M, up 25M quarter-over-quarter.

items.title: Qualcomm Q2 Revenue at $10.6B, Hyperscaler to Use Chips Later This Year
items.summary: Qualcomm reported Q2 revenue slightly down year-over-year but highlighted progress in data centers with a top hyperscaler set to adopt its chips, boosting QCOM shares by 12%+ after hours.

items.title: SoftBank Plans US Robotics Company Roze for Data Centers with $100B Valuation
items.summary: SoftBank is creating a new AI and robotics firm called Roze in the US to build data centers, aiming for a $100B valuation and potential IPO as early as 2026.

items.title: Motorola Launches Razr Family Including First Book-Style Foldable with Stylus Support
items.summary: Motorola unveiled its latest Razr series, featuring the Razr Fold as its first book-style foldable with native stylus support, differentiating from competitors like Samsung.

items.title: Huawei's HarmonyOS Now on Over 55M Phones Amid China Push for Domestic Software
items.summary: Huawei reported HarmonyOS running on more than 55 million phones as China accelerates adoption of homegrown software alternatives.

items.title: EU Probes Meta for Insufficient Child Protection on Instagram and Facebook
items.summary: The EU launched a preliminary investigation finding Meta failing to adequately protect minors on its platforms, potentially leading to regulatory actions.
